Video.summary: From the love he has for his siblings, to battling on the pitch with Perisic during his time at PSV, Denzel Dumfries shares all this and more in the fourth episode of Careers
Video.title: Careers Dumfries 2021 2022

Video.summary: Inter was born with a different idea. Open to the world. Open to ambition. From its foundation in 1908 to the modern era, Inter has built an identity that goes beyond trophies.
